label: professional_details
value: Works as a facilities coordinator, leading an initiative to enhance facility management efficiency across multiple locations, aims to optimize time management skills for increased responsibilities, considers investments in technology or services to boost efficiency, interested in project management tools for facility management such as IBM Maximo, FTMaker, Asana, Monday.com, and others.

label: learning_interests
value: Interested in getting certified in green cleaning practices, exploring certifications such as ISSA CIMS-GB, GSC, and LEED AP, taking online courses and attending workshops/seminars on green cleaning and sustainability.

label: business_interests
value: Investing in market research and business planning courses to prepare for a future eco-friendly cleaning service, budget is currently tight but hopeful it will pay off. Interested in tools and software for managing day-to-day operations including project management, task tracking, scheduling, booking, CRM, financial management, inventory and supply management, communication, collaboration, marketing, branding, time tracking, billing, green cleaning certification and training, document management, and client feedback.

label: entertainment
value: Interested in online communities and forums discussing existentialism and its impact on modern life, such as r/existentialism, r/philosophy, Philosophy Forums, Goodreads Groups, Quora, Facebook Groups, and Discourse Forums. Also interested in online courses and webinars on Coursera and edX, and blogs/websites like The Existentialist Cowboy and Existential Comics.

label: financial_advice
value: Considering high-yield savings accounts and robo-advisors like Betterment or Wealthfront for flexible investments, aiming to manage finances better while supporting entrepreneurial goals.

label: volunteering_interests
value: Organizing and teaching a series of art workshops at the local community center, coordinating supplies, mentoring younger participants, interested in expanding network and deepening community involvement through collaborations, attending community events, joining professional associations, developing themed workshops, incorporating green cleaning practices, offering mentorship programs, engaging in community service projects, creating an online presence, offering online workshops and webinars, gathering participant feedback, and pursuing professional development.

label: gardening_experience
value: Expanded vegetable garden recently, added raised beds and a small greenhouse, experimenting with advanced planting techniques and complex crop rotations, seeking to connect with a local gardening club or group for sharing insights and learning from fellow advanced gardeners.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Taking a break from the job to focus on photography and organize a small exhibition, balancing with other hobbies like sketching and visiting art museums.

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Considering tools like Eventbrite, Trello, Asana, Google Drive, Canva, Mailchimp, Adobe Lightroom, Photoshop, Doodle, Dropbox, Box, Hootsuite, and Buffer for organizing a photography exhibition.
